title: strategy_007_adx_filter_supertrend_entry
thesis_bullets: STRATEGY: ADX Trend Filter + Supertrend Entry ASSET: BTC, ETH TIMEFRAME: 4h MARKET CONDITION: Strong trending markets TYPE: Trend following CONCEPT: Only take trades when the market is confirmed trending using ADX.
Use Supertrend indicator for precise entry and exit timing.
This avoids choppy sideways markets where most strategies bleed out from false signals.

INDICATORS USED: - ADX (period 14) - trend strength filter, must be above 25 - Supertrend (period 10, multiplier 3.0) - entry/exit signal - EMA 50 - medium trend direction - EMA 200 - major trend direction - ATR (period 14) - stop loss and position sizing ENTRY LONG: 1.
Supertrend flips from red to green (buy signal) 4.
Price closes above Supertrend line All conditions must be true on the same candle close.

EXIT RULES: - Primary exit: Supertrend flips opposite direction - Stop loss: 1.5x ATR(14) from entry price - Take profit: 3.0x ATR(14) from entry price (2:1 reward-risk) - Trailing stop: Once in 1.5 ATR profit, trail stop at 1.0 ATR behind price - Max hold time: 30 candles (120 hours on 4h) RISK MANAGEMENT: - Risk per trade: 1% of account - Max concurrent positions: 1 per asset - No new entries if

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 4h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 4h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
